title: Extreme Realistic Minecraft
description: Play Minecraft in a hyper-realistic experience with amazing mechanics, stunning graphics and unmissable details!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cvJppRWn6KU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## EN
Dive into the most realistic Minecraft modpack ever created! With amazing mechanics, stunning graphics, and unmissable details, you'll experience the world of Minecraft like never before. Build, explore, and survive in an environment so realistic that you'll forget you're in a game. Live an unforgettable adventure and discover the true potential of Minecraft with this incredible modpack.

If you want to learn more about what’s included, check out this video: [https://youtu.be/cvJppRWn6KU]

I love Minecraft mods, and this is my first "mini modpack". Feel free to comment on any issues or how I can improve. All credits go to DillPickle66, the creator of the "Remarkably Optimized" modpack used to optimize this modpack.

## ES
¡Sumérgete en el modpack más realista de Minecraft jamás creado! Con mecanias asombrosas, gráficos impresionantes y detalles imperdibles, experimentarás el mundo de Minecraft como nunca antes. Construye, explora y sobrevive en un entorno tan realista que olvidarás que estás en un juego. Vivi una aventura inolvidable y descubre el verdadero potencial de Minecraft con este increíble modpack.

Si queres saber más sobre lo que trae te recomiendo este video: [https://youtu.be/cvJppRWn6KU]

Me encantan los mods para Minecraft y este es mi primer "mini modpack", no dudes en comentar los problemas o como puedo mejorar. Todos los creditos a DillPickle66 creador del modpack "Remarkably Optimized" utilizado para optimizar este modpack.
